scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.image:build: npm run image:server && npm run image:client
scripts.image:save: mkdir -p artifacts/images && docker save short-service-server:1.0.0 -o artifacts/images/short-service-server-1.0.0.tar && docker save short-service-client:1.0.0 -o artifacts/images/short-service-client-1.0.0.tar
